payload.label: chair

payload.long_description: Ornate dark reddish-brown wooden chair showing a carved scrollwork back splat and visible seat and front legs; the crop is edge-cropped (partial view of the backrest and lower frame), polished finish, approximate distance ~1.0 m from camera.
